para_trans: The distribution of funds under the main head General Education during the financial year under the Tribal Components Programme (Headings 2202 1901, 2202 1948 and 2202 H 973 under Subject No. 36 - Auxiliary Grants (Salary))
Government Decision No: BUD-2026 / Q. No.04 / Ka-6.
Read: - School Education and Sports Department No. SESD- 40010/3/2026 -BUD-SESD-SCHOOL (eOffice No.1617614).

Proposal: - The Department of Education has requested for the release of funds available for disbursement within the limit of 10 of the funds provided by the Finance Department in the budget of the year 2026-27 for payment of salaries to the staff of the Subordinate Secondary Schools, Junior Colleges and Military Schools of the Department of Education under the Tribal Components Programme. The issue of disbursement of funds was under consideration of the Government as per the above proposal of the School Education Department.
Government Decision: - Demand No. Under the main head 2202-Gen. Education in T-5, the Government is approving the following: - (Rs. in millions).

2. As mentioned above, a total of Rs. 1597.442 lakhs (literal Rs. fifteen crores ninety nine lakhs forty four thousand two hundred only) is being disbursed to the Principal Secretary, Department of School Education, Mantralaya, Mumbai as the Head of the Administrative Department on the Budgetary Distribution System.

para_trans: Government Decision No: BUD-2026 / Q. No.04 / Executive No.6
3. While spending the said amount, the Financial Rules in the Maharashtra Budget Manual, Fiscal Authorization Manual as well as the No. In the Government Order of 1
It shall be the responsibility of the administrative department concerned to strictly comply with the directives.

4. The Controlling Officer and the Head of the Department shall ensure that the expenditure incurred in the Tribal Sub-Plan area shall be separately recorded in the Tribal Sub-Plan area. Accordingly, the report of expenditure incurred, material target achieved by title / sub-heading, beneficiary information, fund utilization certificate, etc. should be sent to the Tribal Development Department by 10th of every month.
5. The Department concerned shall be responsible for ensuring that only Scheduled Tribe beneficiaries benefit from the provisions made available under the Tribal Component Programme.

6. The Government decision is being issued by the Finance Department within the limits of the funds made available on the budgetary fund distribution system and the powers conferred on the administrative departments.
(9. This Government Decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
